docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-03-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROBERTO CORPUZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN CHAN IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $150 TO THE PLAINTIFF AND THAT THE CHECK ISSUED FOR OCT 2021 MORTGAGE AND HOA HAS BEEN SATISFIED. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAR-03-2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,385.86 FILED BY CORPUZ, ROBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, CHRISTIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $100) SERVED DEC-15-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, CHRISTIAN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
